title: [Security] Remove hardcoded changeme passwords from Helm values
description: CRITICAL: 14 occurrences of hardcoded passwords found in values.yaml files. Replace with empty strings and document Vault injection requirement.
close_reason: Removed all hardcoded 'changeme' passwords from values.yaml files. Replaced with empty strings and Vault injection comments. Fixed files: hub, stalwart (2 occurrences + configmap), n8n, vaultwarden (2 occurrences), logging (4 occurrences), teamcity, excalidraw, monitoring, youtrack.

title: [Security] Pin all :latest Docker image tags to specific versions
description: CRITICAL: 9 occurrences of :latest tags in monitoring, logging, youtrack, zerobyte charts. Pin to specific versions for reproducibility and security.
close_reason: Pinned all :latest Docker image tags to specific versions. Fixed: monitoring (prometheus v3.1.0, loki 3.3.2, promtail 3.3.2, grafana 11.4.0), stalwart (v0.10.8), excalidraw (sha-4bdf58f, 1.0.0), logging setup-job (curl 8.11.1), youtrack init containers (curl 8.11.1), zerobyte cronjob (restic 0.17.3).

title: Harmonize inventory group names

title: Fix all.yml: change role: apps to role: infrastructure
description: Lines 19, 34, 49 in ansible/all.yml reference role: apps which does not exist. Change to role: infrastructure. The infrastructure role uses nested tags: base (namespace, traefik, vault, consul) and apps (stoat, stalwart, youtrack, hub, teamcity, authentik, vaultwarden). Each service name is also a sub-tag for granular deployment.
